---
title: "Projects"
---

## YouTube Virality Project

**Overview:**\
Developed a machine learning model in Python to predict whether a YouTube video would become viral using large-scale metadata and textual features.

**My Contribution:**\
Scraped and processed over 774,000 video records, engineered structured and text-based features, and helped train a neural network model to analyze patterns in video performance.

**Tools:**\
Python, Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn, TensorFlow, machine learning

**Link:**\
[Github Repo](https://github.com/jhc73/pic16b)

or

[Report](virality_report)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Movie Box Office Regression Analysis

**Overview:**\
Built a multiple linear regression project in R to study how movie reviews and related features influenced box office revenue.

**My Contribution:**\
Worked on data analysis, diagnostic plots, model interpretation, and presentation of findings.

**Tools:**\
R, regression analysis, data visualization

**Link:**\
[Report](my_resume.pdf)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Los Angeles Housing Price Analysis

**Overview:**\
Conducted an exploratory analysis of housing prices in Los Angeles using historical housing datasets and geographic data. The project focused on identifying spatial and structural patterns that influence property values.

**My Contribution:**\
Cleaned and processed housing datasets, integrated geographic boundary data for Los Angeles County, and built a regression-based model to examine how location and housing characteristics relate to price trends.

**Tools:**\
List tools, skills, or methods.

**Link:**\
[Research Poster](final_poster.pdf)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Women Film Directors Analysis (PrimeTime Project)

**Overview:**\
Analyzed gender representation in the film industry by examining datasets of film directors and movie production data. The project focused on identifying disparities in the number of films directed by women across time and production contexts.

**My Contribution:**\
Designed and refined data visualizations to highlight patterns in gender representation among film directors. Transformed raw movie datasets into interpretable charts that supported exploratory analysis and discussion within the research team.

**Results:**\
The project produced an interactive website presenting the analysis and visualizations, helping communicate trends in gender disparity within the film industry.

**Tools:**\
Data visualization, Tableau, exploratory data analysis, collaborative research

**Link:**\
[PrimeTime](https://primetime.humspace.ucla.edu)
------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Dating Profile Data Visualization Project

**Overview:**\
Created a Tableau-based group project analyzing dating profile data to identify trends and patterns in self-presentation.

**My Contribution:**\
Contributed to analysis, visualization design, and communicating results in a presentation.

**Tools:**\
Tableau, data visualization, exploratory data analysis

**Link:**\
[Presentation Slides](dating_slides.pdf)
